title: Extracting Customer Demographics from Survey Data
scenario: A company has survey data collected from its customers, including demographic information such as age, location, and interests. The goal is to extract the age and location of customers from the survey data and present the extracted information in a formatted JSON object, specifically grouping customers by location and age range
constraints: Must group customers by location and age range
Must use a library to handle date and time calculations

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the customers are grouped correctly by location and age range
Check if the code is syntactically correct
Check if the extracted demographic information is accurate and matches the expected results
